TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 8, Mohammed VI of Morocco, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1963) mrhuw Morocco ta' misuw hya' ga Mohammed VI of Morocco, aring ryax tay 23 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 1999 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, mońßamme* *i o* moro ¶~ ® ¶~ ®o, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw moro ¶~ ® ¶~ ®o ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a mońßamme* *i o* moro ¶~ ® ¶~ ®o, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 8, Mohammed VI of Morocco, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1963) mrhuw Morocco ta' misuw hya' ga Mohammed VI of Morocco, aring ryax tay 23 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 1999 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, mońßamme* *i o* moro ¶~ ® ¶~ ®o, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw moro ¶~ ® ¶~ ®o ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a mońßamme* *i o* moro ¶~ ® ¶~ ®o, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
